About Us
HOURS
Bringing back a taste of a simpler time, when life was all about living in the moment. Our community market and bistro have been designed to transport you to another place and time, where you can lose yourself, just for a while in a comfortable, rustic atmosphere with a French Provincial feel.
View Menus
Lunch
Lunch at Le Bistro is a delightful experience for lunch with friends or business associates. You’ll love our charming dining areas with their French Provincial flair or dine al fresco on our porch overlooking Canton Street.  Our menu items will delight your inner foodie with choices including crepes and flatbreads, Hors d’Oeuvres, soups and salads topped with seared ahi tuna, smoked salmon or grilled chicken, quiche, and sandwiches like Le French Dip, Le Croque Monsieur, Le Parisien Jambon  Beurre.  For a hearty meal, try our Bouche a la Reine, a puff pastry filled with chicken, mushrooms, onions and béchamel sauce, or our Beef Bourguignon with braised beef, carrots, onions and mushrooms served with fresh pappardelle.
Brunch
You’re in for a treat when you decide to Brunch with us on the weekend!  With delicious crepes topped and filled with savory or sweet ingredients, a variety of quiche, including Lorraine, spinach, or smoked salmon and goat cheese, you’ll start your morning off right!  If you plan to linger longer, don’t forget a mimosa or Bloody Mary! Grab a friend or three and enjoy a fabulous time on our balcony. Spring is here and what better way to spend your time relaxing, indulging and soaking up the beautiful atmosphere. Join us! You won't be disappointed... We promise.
Dessert
As you might imagine with our Patisserie downstairs, we specialize in desserts at Le Bistro.  End your romantic dinner with a delicious cupcake in a variety of flavors like red velvet, peanut butter, oreo, lemon, or white chocolate and raspberry.  Looking for something to share?  Try our Bistro Brownie served warm with vanilla ice cream, chocolate and Reeses peanut butter sauce and reeses chunks! Other indulgences include our Banana Split Crepe, Bread Pudding, Kahlua Coffee Toffee, our delicious Tarte aux Pommes (Apple tart with ice cream and caramel drizzle) or Les Profiteroles!  Our scrumptious desserts will have you saying “Ooh la la” all the way home!
Bon Appetit!

About Us
HOURS
Looking for a cozy, comfortable venue conveniently located in the Historic District on Canton Street? Le Bistro is right in the heart of Canton Street, the place to be seen in Roswell.  Our French Provincial interior will delight your guests and transport them to another time and place, where they will be inspired to savor every moment.
From Christmas Parties, Corporate Parties, Baby & Bridal Showers to special Birthdays, Engagement Parties and Rehearsal Dinners; our second floor location has a variety of options for your special event, including our outdoor balcony overlooking Canton Street.
Event Request Form:
We would love to help you host your next event. Please fill out the portion below and we will reach out to you as soon as we can. Merci.
*For more information or questions, please call
770-645-2629
Rehearsal Dinner
Your rehearsal dinner should be special with no detail overlooked.  The dining rooms, bar and quaint balcony overlooking Canton Street provide the perfect setting for entertaining your dinner guests and providing your party with a memorable experience unmatched in the Roswell area.
Shower
Le Bistro is the perfect location for baby and bridal showers with its rustic French flair. Your guests will be delighted by our décor and will find themselves immersed in the Provincial feel of our lovely dining rooms, bar and balcony area.
Birthday
Create a birthday celebration they’ll never forget in our beautifully-decorated, historically-themed Provincial dining area.  Complete with separate bar area, two dining rooms, a large gathering area and a balcony overlooking Canton Street, Le Bistro is the perfect spot for your special birthday celebration.
Our inside rooms and outdoor options include the following:
one-room (up to 20 guests)
two-room (up to 40 guests)
front outdoor balcony (up to 30 guests)
also offering Full-Facility and Back Porch Rentals.
Special Event Extras:
"Baby Carriage" Gift Holder $35.00
Baby Clothesline (Boy/Girl) $35.00
Information Sheets:
Event Menu $24.95

About Us
HOURS
"A slice of old school America with a European flair"
Bringing back a taste of a simpler time, when life was all about living in the moment. Our community market and bistro have been designed to transport you to another place and time, where you can lose yourself, just for a while in a comfortable, rustic atmosphere with a French Provincial feel.
Owners Kelly Smith-Blacha and Lorry Kemp, longtime friends and Roswell residents wanted to bring a true community gathering spot to the historic downtown area.  The décor and gathering areas are designed to inspire conversation and encourage guests to linger longer with friends.
In 2008 Kelly and Lorry opened Party Chic by KellyKakes, a special events venue and home to KellyKakes. Inspired to create something special in historic Roswell, they opened Roswell Provisions in 2011. In 2013, following a warm welcome by the community, they expanded their concept and transitioned the upstairs from Party Chic to what is now Le Bistro, replicating the rustic, Provincial atmosphere of their market below. They invite you to stop in, gather with friends, get lost for a while and enjoy the community of Canton Street.
